commit.message:
fix(devcontainer): persist Claude auth across rebuilds with bind mount and machine-id

Revert from Docker volume to host bind mount for ~/.claude, and restore
project-specific /etc/machine-id generation. Empty machine-id was the
root cause of re-authentication on rebuild.

Closes #8

commit.message:
fix(devcontainer): generate project-specific machine-id

Generate /etc/machine-id from project folder name hash to maintain
consistent container identity across rebuilds while ensuring different
projects have different IDs.

Format: md5sum of "devcontainer-${localWorkspaceFolderBasename}"

Refs #8

commit.message:
fix(devcontainer): create .claude.json to prevent auth re-confirmation

Add creation of ~/.claude/.claude.json in postCreateCommand.
Without this file, Claude Code treats the environment as a new
installation and requests re-authentication on every container rebuild.

Refs #8

commit.message:
fix: hands-free toggle, hide pill when inactive, and transcription quality

- Hands-free mode: shortcut handler now reads settings toggle instead of
  always resetting to push-to-talk; single press starts/stops in toggle mode
- Hide pill: fix deadlock in set_state() where should_show_pill() tried to
  re-lock AppState mutex; added should_show_pill_for_state() without mutex;
  settings listener now immediately hides/shows pill on toggle change
- Transcription: add Blackman-windowed sinc anti-aliasing filter before
  48kHz→16kHz downsampling; set Whisper temperature=0 for deterministic output

commit.message:
feat: zsh shell hook for auto-notify on long-running commands

Hooks into zsh preexec/precmd to detect commands that take longer
than NOTIFY_THRESHOLD (default 10s) and sends a notification with
command name, exit status, and duration.

Excludes interactive commands (vim, ssh, top, etc.) by default.
Works in TTY sessions without D-Bus/desktop environment.

Usage: source shell-hook.zsh in ~/.zshrc

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Make homepage and blog posts responsive for mobile

feat: add application-load-balancer resource type (#29)

* feat: add application-load-balancer resource type

Adds support for YC Application Load Balancer (ALB) as a managed
resource type, enabling scheduled start/stop via Rundeck.

- yc_common.py: status constants ALB_ACTIVE/STOPPING/STOPPED/STARTING
- node_source.py: list_alb(), alb_to_node(), _ALB_STATUSES mapping
- start.py: start_alb() function and match case
- stop.py: stop_alb() function and match case
- tests: full unit test coverage (TestStartAlb, TestStopAlb, TestAlbToNode)
- e2e.yml: application_load_balancer input flag and test job
- examples/main.tf: ALB added to production example with stop_order=3
- README.md: application-load-balancer marked as done (0.3.0)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: update .gitignore

* fix(e2e): pass --location to yc alb load-balancer create

ALB API requires at least one location in allocation_policy.
Resolve subnet_id from the same query used for network_id and
pass --location zone=...,subnet-id=... to satisfy the constraint.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(e2e): increase ALB ACTIVE wait timeout to 10 minutes

ALB provisioning takes longer than NLB. 30×10s was not enough;
extend to 60×10s (10 min) to avoid false timeouts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(e2e): increase ALB delete verification timeout to 10 minutes

ALB deletion takes longer than NLB. 18×10s (3 min) was insufficient;
extend to 60×10s (10 min).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add Canvas UI — single-canvas Arabic-first interface (46 files, 0 TS errors)

Complete implementation of the Rasid Canvas UI per E07 spec:
- Single Canvas architecture (no routes) with RTL Arabic-first design
- 10 card types: File, ContextActions, Plan, Run, Preview, Result, Editor, Diff, Evidence, Share
- Zustand state machine (12 states: IDLE→COMPOSING→...→COMPLETED/FAILED)
- Virtualized ChatStream, Composer with file attach/voice, FocusStage with zoom
- Sidebar (hidden/peek/full) with 5 tabs, Command Palette (Cmd+K)
- Motion system (E07-0113): micro/short/base/long durations, spring/cubic easings
- 18 shadcn/ui primitives (Button, Card, Dialog, Tabs, Badge, etc.)
- Dark/Light theme, Tajawal font, drag & drop, context-aware actions by file type
- Vite + React 19 + TypeScript strict + Tailwind CSS + Framer Motion

Fix thin-film interference physics: one phase flip model

- filmR: change +cos to −cos in Airy cross-term; one net phase flip (air→oxide
  flips, oxide→metal does not) gives constructive at 2nd = (m+½)λ
- Swap boostLams/cancelLams: constructive at 2nd/(m+½), destructive at 2nd/m
- Oxide-steel diagram label: '½λ phase flip' → 'no phase flip' (grey colour)
- Update explanatory paragraphs to match corrected physics
- Result: 50nm oxide → reinforced at λ = 4×2.3×50 = 460nm (blue) ✓

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Lesson 5.1: Energy, Heat & Thermochemistry + new lesson design philosophy

Lesson 5.1 covers energy (kinetic/potential), heat vs temperature,
specific heat capacity, calorimetry, enthalpy, bond energies, Hess's Law,
and standard enthalpies of formation. Includes thermoViz sim with four
interactive modes (heatTransfer, specificHeat, bondEnergy, hessLaw).

Updated CLAUDE.md with Math Academy-inspired lesson design philosophy:
atomic bite-sized topics, scaffolded frontier (worked example → guided →
solo → twist), 40-50% quiz/checkpoint ratio, interleaving problems from
prior lessons, layered building with explicit dependency chains.

feat: v22 light patch system for fast refresh without LLM

Split needsRefresh into needsLightPatch + needsFullRefresh.
Light patches add DataviewJS sections (Star trend, decision score,
health dashboard, vault ranking, same-owner, contributor_count,

Full refresh only triggers for notes missing LLM-dependent content.
This dramatically speeds up Actions runs for format upgrades.

docs: finalize pipeline v2 design, rename from v6 to v2

Iteratively refined map-reduce summarization design through multiple
comprehensive analyses. Key decisions: simplified output format (4 fields),
zero-text-file content routed to skipped_contents.json only, all prompts
defined (per-file, chunk, chunk-merge, intermediate merge, final merge),
single model per run with modular config.

fix: GitHub Actions npm ci → supabase-js만 설치하도록 수정

npm ci는 Windows에서 생성된 lockfile의 플랫폼별 네이티브 모듈(sharp 등)로
Linux 환경에서 실패. 스크립트에 필요한 @supabase/supabase-js만 설치.

commit.message:
feat: cinematic hook styles — 8 Jordan Peele-inspired cold opens

Adds a Cinematic Intro feature to the Script Panel. Users can browse 8
pre-built cinematic cold open styles (Church Whispers, Bill Drop, The Call,
Church Lady Fan, Son's Discovery, Sister's Truth, Casket Price Tag, Calendar
Countdown) and apply one to their script. When a style is applied, its
pre-built B-roll scenes are prepended to the visual plan as scenes 1-N and
the AI-generated scenes are renumbered starting at N+1.

- New types: CinematicScene, CinematicHookStyle (src/types/cinematic-hook.ts)
- New seed: 8 hardcoded styles with rawImagePrompt, rawKlingPrompt, soundNote
  per scene — buildImagePrompt/buildKlingPrompt applied at merge time
- script-repo: add updateScriptMetadata() for JSONB patch without re-insert
- actions/script: add setCinematicHookStyleAction() to save/clear styleId
  in script.metadata.cinematicHookStyleId
- visual-plan-generator: accept cinematicHookStyle?, buildCinematicScenes()
  helper, prependCinematic() wraps all three code paths, scene numbering
  offset passed to AI prompt so it starts at the correct scene number
- actions/visual-plan: read cinematicHookStyleId from script metadata,
  resolve style, pass to generator
- script-panel: Cinematic Intro section with 8 style cards, Apply/Remove
  buttons, active badge + green strip, tracks currentScriptId across regen

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Use node dist/ compiled files for bybit and okx modes.

commit.message:
localize remaining UI strings to Traditional Chinese

Wrap runtime String values (navigationTitle ternary, storage fallback,
AppKit cell label, file promise filename, zero-byte display) in
NSLocalizedString so they participate in zh-Hant localization.
Split SwiftUI ternary in DeviceListRow so "Unknown" is a LocalizedStringKey
literal. Add zh-Hant entries for all newly covered keys plus previously
auto-localized literals that lacked xcstrings entries.

chartPreviousClose는 차트 시작일(1개월 전) 종가라 일간 등락 계산에 부적합.
Yahoo Finance v7 quote API의 regularMarketPreviousClose(전일 종가)를 사용하도록 변경.
chart API(히스토리) + quote API(당일 시세) 병렬 요청, quote 실패 시 fallback 처리.
